title: Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mayureswar Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Tehsil Baramati in Pune district in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Mayureswar Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Tehsil Baramati in Pune district in Maharashtra, India. It is 74 km from Pune and 35 km from Daund.

topPlaces.name: Ganesha Temple, Morgaon
topPlaces.description: Shri Mayureshwar Mandir or Shri Moreshwar Temple is a Hindu temple (mandir) dedicated to Ganesha, god of wisdom. It is located in Moragaon in Pune District, about 65 km away from Pune city in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Karhati
topPlaces.description: Karhati is a village in a Baramati block/tehsil of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The name of the village seems to be derived from Marathi expression Kaŗhechyā kāthī (on the banks of the Karha River).

items.note: Shri Mayureshwar Mandir or Shri Moreshwar Temple is a Hindu temple (mandir) dedicated to Ganesha, god of wisdom. It is located in Moragaon in Pune District, about 65 km away from Pune city in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

Karhati is a village in a Baramati block/tehsil of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The name of the village seems to be derived from Marathi expression Kaŗhechyā kāthī (on the banks of the Karha River).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ganesha Temple, Morgaon, Karhati.
